violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --- Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Reach-in Coolers & Freezers in need of cleaning from food crumbs collecting at bottom of units.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Edges of floors, under & around equipment in need of more through sweeping and mopping in kitchen.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
